ABOUT.TITLE: Who am I?
ABOUT.SUBTITLE: I'm Gianluca Castorina, Full Stack Developer
ABOUT.DESCRIPTION: Driven Software Developer with a degree from UTN Mar del Plata. I excel at transforming complex requirements into efficient digital solutions, combining strong backend architecture with intuitive, dynamic frontend designs.
ABOUT.LANGUAGES_VAL: Java, TypeScript, JavaScript, SQL, C, HTML, CSS.

SERVICES.TITLE: Professional Services
SERVICES.SUBTITLE: High-Performance Software & Hardware Solutions
SERVICES.CARD_1_DESC: Building scalable and robust web applications using the Java Spring Boot and Angular ecosystem for modern business needs.
SERVICES.CARD_2_DESC: Custom software development for inventory management, local sales systems, and optimized business logic implementation.
SERVICES.CARD_3_DESC: Relational database design and optimization using PostgreSQL and MySQL, focusing on data integrity and high-speed queries.
SERVICES.CARD_4_DESC: Professional OS optimization for gaming and high-end productivity. Latency reduction and maximum hardware throughput.
SERVICES.CARD_5_DESC: Technical consultancy, custom high-end PC builds, and professional repair for laptops and desktops.
SERVICES.CARD_6_DESC: Deploying private Large Language Models (LLMs) on local hardware using Ollama for secure and customized AI environments.

EXPERIENCE.TITLE: Professional Experience
EXPERIENCE.SUBTITLE: My journey as a Freelancer and IT Professional
EXPERIENCE.JOB_1_DESC: Providing end-to-end web solutions for local businesses and personal clients. I specialize in building management systems and landing pages using Spring Boot, Angular, and PostgreSQL.
EXPERIENCE.JOB_1_BULLET_1: Requirements gathering and direct communication with clients to define business logic.
EXPERIENCE.JOB_1_BULLET_2: Design and implementation of relational databases tailored to specific business needs.
EXPERIENCE.JOB_1_BULLET_3: Deployment and maintenance of applications in production environments.

WORK.TITLE: Featured Projects
WORK.SUBTITLE: A selection of my recent technical work
WORK.PROJ_1_DESC: Developing a Full-Stack platform featuring a public showcase and a private backoffice. Focused on secure access control using JWT and Angular Guards, while leveraging PostgreSQL's JSONB to handle dynamic service data and complex business requirements.
WORK.PROJ_2_DESC: Built a transactional inventory system with an integrated online store for my graduation thesis. Led a successful database migration to PostgreSQL, significantly improving system scalability and the efficient handling of unstructured data structures.
WORK.PROJ_3_DESC: Designed an assistant for catalog product sellers to manage inventory and customer sales. Modeled a high-performance relational database tailored specifically to the project's logic, ensuring data integrity and optimal speed for daily transactions.
